# Feature Change Template

Use this template when you add a new feature doc or heavily revise an existing one.

## Feature Name

Short name here

## Purpose

What problem this feature solves.

## Source Files

- `path/to/file`

## Current Behavior

- behavior 1
- behavior 2
- behavior 3

## State Rules

- what resets the feature
- what advances the feature
- what data it depends on

## UI Rules

- visible controls
- hidden assumptions
- interaction constraints

## Do Not Break

- invariant 1
- invariant 2

## Related Docs

- another doc if needed
